criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance user experience, such as through personalized recommendations, chatbots, or content moderation.
criteria.sources: App feature descriptions, developer documentation, user reviews.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and activity within the app, measured by metrics like daily active users, session length, and user retention rates.
criteria.sources: App analytics reports, industry studies, developer disclosures.

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: The robustness of the app's measures to protect user data and ensure secure interactions, including encryption, data handling policies, and compliance with regulations.
criteria.sources: App privacy policies, security audits, compliance certifications.

criteria.name: User Satisfaction
criteria.description: Overall user satisfaction with the app, reflected in ratings, reviews, and feedback across various platforms.
criteria.sources: App store ratings, user reviews, independent surveys.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The app's introduction of novel features or approaches that distinguish it from competitors, particularly in the use of AI technologies.
criteria.sources: App feature announcements, tech news articles, developer blogs.
